creator: inbox@alleghenycomputer.com
text:
Hi,

I am getting a missing file error when trying to update Bibletime via portmaster.

I am using:  FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p9 amd64

I can confirm that there is no file named "bthtml.js" in the listed folder.  The only file in that folder is "btwebengine.js".

Here's the error:

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for bibletime-2.11.2_2
===>  Checking if bibletime is already installed
===>   Registering installation for bibletime-2.11.2_2
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/misc/bibletime/work/stage/usr/local/share/bibletime/javascript/bthtml.js:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/misc/bibletime

===>>> Installation of bibletime-2.11.2_2 (misc/bibletime) failed
===>>> Aborting update
